name: eelektrik
flavor_texts: They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.
These Pokémon have a big appetite. When they spot their prey, they attack it and paralyze it with electricity.
It wraps itself around its prey and paralyzes it with electricity from the round spots on its sides. Then it chomps.
text: Eelektrik is the EleFish Pokémon. It is a electric-type Pokémon. Abilities: levitate. Base stats — HP: 65, Attack: 85, Defense: 70, Sp. Atk: 75, Sp. Def: 70, Speed: 40. Evolution line: tynamo → eelektrik → eelektross. Lore: They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns. These Pokémon have a big appetite. When they spot their prey, they attack it and paralyze it with electricity. It wraps itself around its prey and paralyzes it with electricity from the round spots on its sides. Then it chomps.
